text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 27 

ENRL_SRC 

LABEL: Enrollment Source 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the source of enrollment data. 

SHORT NAME: ENRL_SRC 

LONG NAME: ENRL_SRC 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CCW 

VALUES: EDB = Enrollment Database 
CME = Common Medicare Environment 

COMMENT: The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) has updated the Medicare enrollment source
